videos.title: Dinner for One (1963) | 8K Restored | Silvester Klassiker
videos.description:
Dinner for One (1963) - The 90th Birthday | 8K AI Restored

Der legendaere Silvester-Sketch mit Freddie Frinton und May Warden in atemberaubender 8K-Qualitaet.

CHAPTERS:
00:00 - Intro
00:25 - Miss Sophie empfaengt Gaeste
01:30 - Der erste Toast Sir Toby

05:00 - Mr Pommeroy
06:45 - Mr Winterbottom
08:30 - Der Tiger
09:45 - The same procedure as last year

CAST:
Freddie Frinton als Butler James
May Warden als Miss Sophie

Original: 1963 NDR

videos.title: The Cure (1917) – Charlie Chaplin | 8K remAIke Silent Comedy (Public Domain) – Best Online Version
videos.description:
The Cure (1917) in 8K – Charlie Chaplin’s classic silent comedy short, restored from public-domain sources and remastered by remAIke. This 8K remAIke edition aims to be one of the best online versions of The Cure, keeping the original film texture while making it clear, stable and beautiful on modern displays.

Made just before Prohibition, The Cure follows a drunk, upper-class Chaplin character who checks into a health spa to “take the cure” – bringing along a huge suitcase full of alcohol. His arrival at the hydropathic hotel turns everything upside down: revolving doors, gout patients, spa attendants and a hopeful young woman all get swept up in Chaplin’s chaos. When the bottles accidentally end up in the spa’s “healing” waters, the entire resort literally gets drunk on its own cure.

In this 8K remAIke restoration you’ll see:
• Charlie Chaplin as a rich, inebriated fop instead of his usual Tramp persona  
• Edna Purviance as the kind young woman who wants him to sober up  
• Eric Campbell as the furious gout patient Chaplin keeps tormenting  
• legendary physical gags with revolving doors, baths, massages and the spiked spa water  
• cleaned, sharpened, stabilized footage with preserved grain and silent-era atmosphere  

This upload is perfect for:
• Chaplin fans exploring his Mutual period comedies  
• film students studying slapstick, timing and silent-film storytelling  
• historians and archivists looking for a high-quality public-domain source  
• anyone who loves classic black-and-white comedy in never-seen 8K quality  

Please note: the film treats alcohol and drunkenness as comic material and reflects attitudes of its time.

If you enjoy restored silent comedies and classic public-domain films in 4K and 8K, please like the video, comment, and subscribe to @remAIke_IT – and visit www.remAIke.IT for more high-quality Chaplin and silent-era restorations.

remAIke – Retro Revive Real. Real improvements, genuine sense of history.
